title: Buddhism: China's New Soft Power Front
title_cn: 佛教：中国的新软实力战线
summary: China is investing billions to shape the future of Buddhism. From temples and universities to the battle over the Dalai Lama's successor, Beijing is using faith as a tool of influence and fueling a growing soft power rivalry with India. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: European Stocks Head for Best Week Since May: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 欧洲股市迎来五月份以来最好的一周：市场总结
summary: Stocks rose as the latest round of jitters about the artificial-intelligence trade subsided, with Europe’s benchmark rising to an all-time high. The dollar touched a two-week low while gold extended gains.

title: The AI Trade Is Losing One of Its Key Signals
title_cn: 人工智能行业正在失去其关键信号之一
summary: At a time when markets are growing uneasy over whether the enormous sums being poured into artificial intelligence will ever pay off, the prices the sector commands for each unit of usage are drifting lower.

title: Oil Wavers as Persian Gulf Flows Surge Toward Pre-War Levels
title_cn: 波斯湾流量激增至战前水平，石油波动
summary: Oil prices wavered in thin trading as the recovery of Persian Gulf flows fomented a new surplus in key parts of the global market.

title_cn: 美联储放宽前景，金价将迎来五月份以来的首次周涨幅
summary: Gold headed for its first weekly gain since May as traders dialed down their expectations of Federal Reserve rate hikes.

title: Copper Tracks Dollar Swings as Traders Weigh US Rate Outlook
title_cn: 交易员权衡美国利率前景，铜跟随美元波动
summary: Copper edged higher, tracking small swings in the US dollar as investors continue to assess the outlook for US monetary policy.

title: Carlyle Hires Banks for $400 Million India IPO of RCM Business
title_cn: 凯雷聘请银行为 RCM 业务在印度进行 4 亿美元的首次公开募股
summary: Carlyle Group Inc. has hired JM Financial Ltd. and Goldman Sachs Group Inc. to advise on a potential initial public offering of its India-based healthcare revenue cycle management business, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: iCON Infrastructure to Buy Northern Fiber in Rescue Deal
title_cn: iCON 基础设施公司将收购北方光纤以达成救援协议
summary: Lenders of Northern Fiber Holding GmbH, a struggling German fiber-network operator formerly owned by UBS Asset Management, are finalizing the sale of the company to iCON Infrastructure to avoid a looming insolvency.

title: Pubs to Get Short-Term World Cup Boost
title_cn: 酒吧将获得世界杯短期提振
summary: UK pubs will be allowed to stay open for Monday’s early morning match, but the overall benefit of the World Cup will likely be short-lived. Bloomberg's Sam Unsed discusses on "The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russia Hikes June Subsidies to Refiners as Fuel Shortages Bite
title_cn: 由于燃料短缺，俄罗斯提高了六月份对炼油厂的补贴
summary: Russia’s subsidy payouts to oil refiners that supply domestic markets jumped more than six-fold in June from a year earlier, as Moscow sought to avoid shortages by keeping more fuel at home.

title: EU Agrees to Cut ESG Reporting Requirements for Asset Managers
title_cn: 欧盟同意削减资产管理公司的 ESG 报告要求
summary: Money managers in Europe won’t have to report ESG data on all the assets they hold, under revised disclosure requirements.

title: What Natural Gas’s Ascendancy Says About the US
title_cn: 天然气的崛起对美国有何影响
summary: Fracking, booming power demand and enthusiastic political support have underpinned the fuel’s rise, but for how long?

title: Adani Group Secures $15 Billion Capital This Week as US Legal Clouds Clear
title_cn: 随着美国法律的阴云散去，阿达尼集团本周获得 150 亿美元资本
summary: In one week, billionaire Gautam Adani has announced nearly $15 billion in investment commitments across its ports, mining and flagship businesses.

title: CVC Plans €1.2 Billion of High-Yield Bonds to Fund Irca Buyout
title_cn: CVC 计划发行 12 亿欧元高收益债券为 Irca 收购提供资金
summary: CVC Capital Partners Plc is set to finance its buyout of Italian food-ingredients maker Irca SpA with €1.2 billion ($1.4 billion) of high-yield bonds, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Mamoon Hamid on the Importance of Identifying Potential
title_cn: 马蒙·哈米德 (Mamoon Hamid) 谈识别潜力的重要性
summary: Barry sits down with Kleiner Perkins Partner, Mamoon Hamid. They discuss Mamoon's thoughts on the AI revolution and his approach to early AI investing.  Mamoon also breaks down how he became an early investor in giants like Slack, Figma, and how Kleiner Perkins assesses the investments they missed.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s State Iron Ore Buyer Extends Restrictions on Fortescue
title_cn: 中国国家铁矿石买家扩大对福蒂斯丘公司的限制
summary: China’s state-backed iron ore buyer has expanded its curbs on Fortescue Ltd.’s iron ore to include new purchases of its Super Special Fines product and not just portside inventories, escalating its dispute with the Australian miner.

title: Indonesia’s Danantara Wealth Fund Sees Senior Management Shakeup
title_cn: 印度尼西亚 Danantara 财富基金高级管理层变动
summary: Indonesian sovereign wealth fund Danantara is reshuffling its management team with a series of new hires, according to people familiar with the matter, as it expands its role under President Prabowo Subianto’s government.

title: Trump Doubles Down on Fed Changes, Burnham Risks Starmer Mistakes  | The Opening Trade 7/2/2026
title_cn: 特朗普加大力度支持美联储调整，伯纳姆面临犯错误的风险开盘交易 7/2/2026
summary:
President Donald Trump and his allies are renewing a push to reshape the Federal Reserve after the Supreme Court this week blocked an effort to fire Governor Lisa Cook.

Some in the Labour Party are worried Andy Burnham risks repeating the mistake of not being sufficiently prepared for government, as he delays key personnel decisions. Burnham won't announce key appointments until after the selection process for the Labour Party's new leader formally concludes, which could give new ministers a slim window to prepare.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investors Warm to Burnham But Say Long-End Gilts Are ‘Unloved’
title_cn: 投资者对伯纳姆表示热情，但表示长期英国国债“不受欢迎”
summary: UK bond investors are gaining confidence in Andy Burnham’s promises of discipline when it comes to borrowing and spending, but not enough to bet on Britain’s long-dated debt.

title: ECB Is 'Comfortable' With Its Base Scenario, Moulin Says
title_cn: 穆林表示，欧洲央行对其基本情景感到“满意”
summary: European Central Bank Governing Council member Emmanuel Moulin comments on the outlook for inflation and monetary policy. He talks with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua at the Aix-en-Provence Economic Forum in France. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gulf Carriers Eye Boeing, Airbus Jets as Air India Weighs Delays
title_cn: 印度航空考虑延误，海湾航空公司关注波音和空客喷气机
summary: Airlines in the Persian Gulf are looking to snap up earlier delivery slots for Boeing Co. and Airbus SE aircraft that may be freed up as Air India Ltd. discusses potentially deferring some orders, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Investors Track Tokens for Clues on AI Trade’s Next Move
title_cn: 投资者追踪代币以寻找 AI Trade 下一步行动的线索
summary: Investors are tracking AI token prices as they try to figure out where the volatile trade goes next.

title: ECB Is in ‘Good Position’ After June Rate Hike, Moulin Says
title_cn: Moulin表示，欧洲央行在六月加息后处于“有利位置”
summary: The European Central Bank is in a comfortable situation after last month’s interest-rate increase as the falling oil price eases price pressures in the euro zone, Governing Council member Emmanuel Moulin said.

title: Trump Allies Push to Reshape Fed | The Pulse 7/3/2026
title_cn: 特朗普盟友推动重塑美联储|脉搏 2026 年 7 月 3 日
summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Kokou Agbo-Bloua, SocGen CIB Global Head of Economics, Cross-Asset & Quant Research; Philippe Aghion, Nobel Prize in Economics Winner; Estelle Brachlianoff, Veolia CEO (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Post Largest Outflows in Over Three Months, BofA Says
title_cn: 美国银行表示，美国股市出现三个多月以来最大规模的资金流出
summary: Investors are turning away from US stocks at the fastest pace since March, according to Bank of America Corp.

title: HSBC, Standard Chartered Weigh SRTs as Asia-Linked Deals Ramp Up
title_cn: 随着亚洲相关交易的增加，汇丰银行和渣打银行考虑 SRT
summary: HSBC Holdings Plc is laying the groundwork for a significant risk transfer linked to a portfolio of Asia-Pacific loans as it ramps up use of the hedging instrument.

title: Taiwanese Brokerage Yuanta Taps Banks for $1.3 Billion of Loans
title_cn: 台湾券商元大向银行发放 13 亿美元贷款
summary: Yuanta Securities Co., Taiwan’s largest brokerage, and its subsidiary, are seeking up to NT$42 billion ($1.3 billion) through two syndicated loans, according to people familiar with the matter, a fundraising that highlights surging demand for financial services amid the stock boom.

title: Xi Replaces Anti-Corruption Leader in Purge of China’s Army
title_cn: 习近平撤换反腐领导人清洗军队
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping has appointed a new head of anti-corruption efforts in the armed forces as he continues the country’s biggest military purge in half a century.

title: Quantum Systems Doubles Valuation to $8B in New Round
title_cn: Quantum Systems 在新一轮融资中估值翻倍至 8B 美元
summary: Quantum Systems has raised $1.2 billion in a funding round, more than doubling the German drone startup’s valuation to about $8 billion post-money. The firm is one of a number of German startups making unmanned aerial vehicles that are benefiting from a surge in military spending in Europe. Co-CEO Sven Kruck spoke to Bloomberg The Opening Trade on July 2 about the startup's potential growth, consolidation in the sector, and Europe's defense spending ambitions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Billionaire Arnault Lauds Mathematics in €50 Million Alma Mater Gift
title_cn: 亿万富翁阿尔诺向母校赠送价值 5000 万欧元的数学礼物
summary: Bernard Arnault extolled the virtues of mathematics after pledging a record €50 million donation for a planned maths research institute at his alma mater, highlighting the discipline’s importance in a world increasingly shaped by AI.

title: Big Tech Sends Workers Into the Field to Help Customers Use AI
title_cn: 大型科技公司派遣员工到现场帮助客户使用人工智能
summary: Microsoft, Amazon follow AI companies by creating units of “forward-deployed” engineers

title: At 17, She Sued Meta and Google, and Won. Now She’s Ready to Tell Her Story
title_cn: 17 岁时，她起诉 Meta 和 Google，并胜诉。现在她准备好讲述她的故事了
summary: Kaley Glenn-Mills’ lawsuit reshaped the fight to protect children from social media. She says she still can’t stop scrolling.

title: Video Games in Europe Face New Restrictions on Age, ‘Loot Boxes’
title_cn: 欧洲电子游戏面临新的年龄限制和“战利品盒”
summary: The video-game industry is bracing for a wave of European regulations that could limit kids’ access to some video games, potentially crimping sales across the globe.

title: Alibaba, Tencent Join $2.8 Billion Funding for Kling AI
title_cn: 阿里巴巴、腾讯为 Kling AI 提供 28 亿美元融资
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. joined a $2.8 billion financing round for Kuaishou Technology’s Kling AI, valuing the creator of one of China’s most popular generative video services at about $15 billion before the investment.

title: AI Productivity Hopes Show ‘Exuberance,’ Allianz’s Subran Says
title_cn: 安联的 Subran 表示，人工智能生产力希望显示出“繁荣”
summary: Artificial intelligence is likely to have a less even impact on economies than the market hype would suggest, according to Allianz Chief Economist Ludovic Subran.

title: Won Jumps as Korea Prepares for Currency Flows From Hynix ADRs
title_cn: 韩国为海力士美国存托凭证 (Hynix ADR) 的货币流动做好准备，韩元大幅上涨
summary: South Korea’s won strengthened after a person familiar with the matter said the nation’s officials were preparing for currency flows related to SK Hynix Inc.’s offering of American depositary receipts.

title: ElevenLabs in Talks on Tender Offer at $22 Billion Valuation
title_cn: ElevenLabs 就估值 220 亿美元的要约收购进行谈判
summary: ElevenLabs has held early talks with investors to let employees sell shares in a secondary offering that would value the artificial intelligence startup at roughly $22 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Allianz's Subran Has Doubts Over Europe's 'AI Dividend'
title_cn: 安联的 Subran 对欧洲的“人工智能红利”表示怀疑
summary: Ludovic Subran, chief investment officer and chief economist at Allianz, says there isn't enough evidence to say that the AI trade is in "bubble" territory. Speaking to Bloomberg's Caroline Connan at the Aix-en-Provence Economic Forum in France, he also says emerging-market stocks are looking more attractive due to demand for semiconductors, and that Europe might fail to reap the "AI dividend." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Quant Funds Draw Billions as AI Trounces Human Traders
title_cn: 人工智能击败人类交易员，中国量化基金吸金数十亿美元
summary: Quant funds in China have become so popular that they are being deluged with investors’ money.

title: Hong Kong Rises as Crucial Node in Asia’s $2 Trillion AI Trade
title_cn: 香港崛起为亚洲 2 万亿美元人工智能贸易的关键节点
summary: Hong Kong has become a vital conduit for high-tech products moving in and out of China, emerging as one node in a $2 trillion network of Asian trade fueled by a global boom in artificial intelligence.

title: Windsor: Market Has Mistaken Demand for AI Compute
title_cn: Windsor：市场对人工智能计算的需求存在错误
summary: Semiconductor stocks started 3Q with their worst two-day selloff in nearly a month. The Philadelphia Stock Exchange Semiconductor Index, which is coming off its best quarter ever with an 88% advance, fell as much as 6% on July 2. Richard Windsor, Founder of Radio Free Mobile spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East & Africa on the stocks performance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Korean Stocks Jump 6% After Turbulent Week on AI Swings
title_cn: 韩国股市在经历人工智能波动的动荡一周后上涨 6%
summary: South Korean stocks rebounded after a near 10% drop in the previous two sessions, highlighting skittish investor sentiment as scrutiny grows over the sustainability of the global AI boom.

title: Kioxia Ships Next-Gen AI Memory Samples to Get Ahead of Rivals
title_cn: Kioxia 交付下一代 AI 内存样品以领先于竞争对手
summary: Kioxia Holdings Corp. has started shipping samples of its next-generation flash memory chips to AI data center operators, seeking to gain ground in the lucrative business against rivals.

title: China Tech’s Deepening Valuation Slump Fails to Lure Buyers
title_cn: 中国科技股估值进一步下滑未能吸引买家
summary: The selloff in China’s biggest internet firms has driven some valuations to record lows but investors say a recovery still looks a way off given the many headwinds they face.

title: AI Factories Create Winners and Losers in Power Equipment Market
title_cn: 人工智能工厂创造电力设备市场的赢家和输家
summary: Next-generation AI factories are forcing power equipment firms to rethink their portfolios in the race to profit from a market expected to be worth more than $200 billion a year.

title: Greek Politician Investigating Spyware Had Mobile Phone Hacked
title_cn: 希腊政客正在调查手机被黑客入侵的间谍软件
summary: The mobile phone of a Greek politician was repeatedly hacked by spyware while he was working on a European Parliament investigation into sellers of the surveillance technology, new research has found.

title: India’s Space Industry Hunts for Its SpaceX Moment
title_cn: 印度航天工业正在寻找 SpaceX 时刻
summary: India’s attempt to fire up its fledgling private space program is showing early signs of success.

title: Chip Industry Urges US to Avoid Moves That Distort Memory Market
title_cn: 芯片行业敦促美国避免扭曲内存市场的举动
summary: Government attempts to address the global memory chip shortage by influencing prices or production capacity would worsen a historic squeeze on supply driven by the artificial intelligence boom, a semiconductor industry group warned the Trump administration.

title: Canada’s Pembina Advances Gas-Fired Data Center Project
title_cn: 加拿大 Pembina 推进燃气数据中心项目
summary: Pembina Pipeline Corp. will move ahead with a C$4.6 billion ($3.2 billion) gas-fired electricity plant that will power a data center project in Alberta.

title: Trump Says He Wants AI Guardrails, But ‘As Little as Possible’
title_cn: 特朗普表示他想要人工智能护栏，但“尽可能少”
summary: President Donald Trump said he sees the need for some standards on artificial intelligence technology, but wants to avoid burdensome restrictions that may hamper American companies competing with China.

title: Treasuries Gain on Fed Rate-Hike Bets | The Close 7/2/2026
title_cn: 美联储加息押注推动美国国债上涨收盘价 7/2/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are MSIM CIO, Portfolio Solutions Group Jim Caron, Roth Capital Senior Research Analyst Craig Irwin, CUNY Graduate Center Research Professor, Economics Paul Krugman, Securitize Co-Founder & CEO Carlos Domingo, Envestnet Co-Chief Investment Officer & Group President Dana D’Auria, Blueprint Capital Advisors CEO Jacob Walthour Jr., Vanguard Senior Fixed Income Client Portfolio Manager Rebecca Venter, Cambria Investment Founder & CIO Meb Faber, & Stew Leonard’s President & CEO Stew Leonard Jr. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Market Uncertainty Grows as Stocks Retrace Gains Following Jobs Report
title_cn: 就业报告公布后股市回撤涨幅，市场不确定性加剧
summary: Jim Caron, CIO of the Portfolio Solutions Group at Morgan Stanley Investment Management, discusses the current state of the stock market heading into the second half of the year. Despite significant gains earlier in the year, Caron addresses whether investors should remain overweight in equities amid recent volatility. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Crusoe in Talks to Raise $3 Billion in Round That May Triple Firm’s Value
title_cn: Crusoe 正在洽谈一轮融资 30 亿美元，这可能会使公司价值增加三倍
summary: Crusoe, the data center upstart with contracts to supply AI computing power for the likes of Meta Platforms Inc. and Oracle Corp., is in talks to raise about $3 billion in a funding round that may triple the company’s valuation, people familiar with the situation said.

title: CEO of Blueprint Capital Advisors Discusses Private Capital Strategies
title_cn: Blueprint Capital Advisors 首席执行官讨论私募资本策略
summary: Jacob Walthour Jr., CEO of Blueprint Capital Advisors, shares his expertise on account management and fund-to-fund services within private capital strategies. The discussion took place against the backdrop of ongoing redemption tensions in the private credit market, highlighting challenges and opportunities in managing private capital investments. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Korean AI Rout Drags Emerging Stocks to Three-Week Low
title_cn: 韩国人工智能溃败将新兴股市拖至三周低点
summary: Most developing-world currencies rallied on Thursday after weaker-than-expected US employment data prompted investors to scale back bets that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates as soon as this month.

title: UBS Sees Tech Sector Resilience Despite Meta
title_cn: 尽管有元数据影响，瑞银仍看到科技行业的韧性
summary: Nadia Lovell of UBS discussed the recent volatility in tech stocks amid speculation about a strategic pivot by Meta. While some market participants worry that hyperscalers may have overbuilt cloud capacity without corresponding monetization, Lovell views the potential offloading of excess capacity as a constructive move that could improve capital efficiency and margins over time. She emphasized that demand for cloud services remains strong, citing robust cloud revenue growth among hyperscalers and increasing enterprise adoption rates in the U.S. Despite the recent sell-off in certain cloud-related stocks, Lovell believes capital expenditure plans for this year and next are largely set, with limited upside but no immediate slowdown. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Turkey Arrests Comedian for Insulting Erdogan, Religion
title_cn: 土耳其因侮辱埃尔多安和宗教而逮捕喜剧演员
summary: Turkey arrested a stand-up comedian on charges that he insulted President Recep Tayyip Erdogan and incited the public to hatred by joking about religion.

title: UK Pauses Controversial Legislation Before Burnham Takes Over
title_cn: 英国在伯纳姆上任之前暂停有争议的立法
summary: UK legislation that would see jury trials scrapped for all but the most serious crimes and introduce an overhaul of the domestic energy industry have been quietly shelved as Prime Minister Keir Starmer prepares to leave office.

title: Brazil Freezes $2 Billion, Pursues Arrests After US Sanction
title_cn: 巴西冻结 20 亿美元，并在美国制裁后逮捕一批人
summary: Brazil’s Federal Police carried out several temporary arrest warrants and search-and-seizure orders on Friday, including to two individuals who were sanctioned by the US Treasury earlier this week.

title: EU Will Weigh Irish Probe in Russian Alumina Sanctions Decision
title_cn: 欧盟将权衡爱尔兰对俄罗斯氧化铝制裁决定的调查
summary: The European Union is waiting for an Irish investigation into its alumina exports to Russia to conclude before taking any decisions on whether to include the raw material in trade sanctions.

title: Bolsonaro Adviser Says Fiscal Bill to Be Focus
title_cn: 博尔索纳罗顾问称财政法案将成为焦点
summary: Daniella Marques, an adviser to Brazilian right-wing presidential candidate Flávio Bolsonaro, said in an interview with SBT News that, if victorious in this year’s elections, his eventual government would propose a constitutional amendment focused on controlling spending and the debt trajectory right from the start. The goal would be to restore confidence and facilitate an adjustment in the benchmark interest rate.

title: UK Irks EU With Request to Participate in Bloc’s Meetings
title_cn: 英国要求参加集团会议激怒欧盟
summary: The UK is pushing to have a voice in some key European Union meetings as the two sides try to reset a post-Brexit relationship, prompting pushback on the continent.

title: The Rival Organizations Fighting to Shape America's 250th Birthday
title_cn: 为庆祝美国 250 周年生日而奋斗的敌对组织
summary: Over the past decade, the US government launched two efforts to plan events tied to the nation’s 250th anniversary. On today’s Big Take podcast, the funding battles and cronyism allegations behind America250 and Freedom 250.

title: Trump Accounts Are the President’s Latest Legacy Play
title_cn: 特朗普账户是总统最新的遗产游戏
summary: The president is aiming for generational impact with the launch of new fund for kids

title: Andy Burnham Surpasses Nigel Farage on His Online Home Turf
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 在网络主场超越奈杰尔·法拉奇 (Nigel Farage)
summary: When Conservative leader Kemi Badenoch dismissed the UK’s likely next prime minister, Andy Burnham, as “a pair of eyelashes and a black T-shirt,” his response lasted five seconds.

title: Americans Drive Into July 4 Holiday With Gas Prices Still Stinging
title_cn: 美国人开车进入 7 月 4 日假期，汽油价格仍然刺痛
summary: Independence Day period set to be third-most expensive for US drivers on record.

title: Moldovan Premier Resigns as Graft Scandal Shakes Country
title_cn: 摩尔多瓦总理因腐败丑闻震惊国家而辞职
summary: Moldova’s prime minister resigned after only eight months, as a corruption scandal ramps up pressure on President Maia Sandu’s administration to push through reforms crucial to the country’s European Union accession bid.

title: Poland Should Be Cautious in Pledging Aid for Ukraine, Tusk Says
title_cn: 图斯克表示波兰在承诺向乌克兰提供援助时应谨慎
summary: Poland should be cautious in pledging further financial aid to Ukraine at next week’s NATO summit in Ankara, Prime Minister Donald Tusk said on Friday, adding to an increasingly skeptical tone in Warsaw toward its eastern neighbor.

title: China Fears Bring Japan, India Back Together
title_cn: 中国的担忧促使日本和印度重新走到一起
summary: The Japanese premier sees India as integral to maintaining the status quo in the Asia-Pacific region.

title: Japan Residence Fees to Surge Amid Record Immigration
title_cn: 日本居留费因创纪录的移民人数而飙升
summary: Japan plans to raise the fees it charges for foreign residence permits as the government tightens immigration measures amid record numbers of non-Japanese seeking to live in the country.

title: Polish Firms Keep Ukraine Push, Shrugging Off Political Tensions
title_cn: 波兰公司摆脱政治紧张局势，继续推动乌克兰发展
summary: Polish companies are increasingly pressing ahead with expansion plans in neighboring Ukraine, shrugging off a recent diplomatic row between Warsaw and Kyiv.

title: Kyiv Mourns 30 Dead in Russian Barrage as Air Defenses Strain
title_cn: 基辅哀悼因防空紧张而在俄罗斯弹幕中丧生的 30 人
summary: Kyiv marked a day of mourning on Friday for victims of a massive Russian missile and drone attack as Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said the death toll had risen to 30.

title: Venezuelans Frustrated by Earthquake Response Want New Presidential Elections
title_cn: 对地震反应感到沮丧的委内瑞拉人希望举行新的总统选举
summary: Acting President Delcy Rodríguez is facing mounting political fallout from last week’s twin earthquakes, with nearly half of Venezuelans saying holding new elections is more urgent than rebuilding after the disaster.

title: Kast’s Approval Bounces Back as He Revives Chile Anti-Crime Push
title_cn: 卡斯特的支持率回升，因为他重振了智利的反犯罪运动
summary: Chile President José Antonio Kast’s approval rating rose from the lowest point of his administration, according to a new poll that comes as he moves to reset expectations and roll out new measures against crime.

title: Argentines Slam Milei Over His Handling of Cabinet Chief Crisis
title_cn: 阿根廷人猛烈抨击米莱对内阁首席危机的处理
summary: Argentines overwhelmingly disapprove of how President Javier Milei handled a corruption scandal involving his former cabinet chief, according to a new poll published days after the onetime aide resigned.

title: Sheinbaum Approval Falls to New Low as Pocketbook Concerns Bite
title_cn: 由于经济担忧加剧，希恩鲍姆的支持率跌至新低
summary: President Claudia Sheinbaum’s approval rating dipped below 50% for the first time in a new poll, as concerns mount over falling purchasing power fueled by rising prices.

title: Burnham Floats Warehouse Tax Hike to Benefit High Street
title_cn: 伯纳姆提出提高仓库税以使高街受益
summary: Andy Burnham said he would increase business rates on warehouse-based companies in order to lower costs for high street shops and bars as he set out details of what he would do if he continues on his path to becoming the next prime minister.

title: The Race to Rescue 8,000 Sailors Still Stranded Behind Hormuz
title_cn: 营救仍被困在霍尔木兹海峡后方的 8,000 名水手的竞赛
summary: After more than 100 days trapped in the Persian Gulf, thousands of seafarers are still waiting for a chance to sail out of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Citi Says Oil May Slump to $60 as Hormuz Shock Fades Away
title_cn: 花旗表示，随着霍尔木兹地震的消退，油价可能跌至 60 美元
summary: Brent oil could extend declines to $60 a barrel by year-end as disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz ease, according to Citigroup Inc., adding to a chorus of bearish outlooks for the global crude market.

title: France's Lescure Targets 2027 Budget Deficit Below 5%
title_cn: 法国 Lescure 目标 2027 年预算赤字低于 5%
summary: French Finance Minister Roland Lescure discusses the nation's budget deficit, bond markets and the outlook for next year's presidential election. He talks with Bloomberg's Caroline Connan at the Aix-en-Provence Economic Forum in France. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Redemption Tension in Private Credit
title_cn: 私人信贷的赎回紧张
summary: Private credit is facing redemption pressures amid market uncertainty. Marianne Zangril, Abidin's global head of multi asset and alternative investment solutions, discusses the implications of these redemption pressures with Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie, highlighting actions taken by firms like Blue Owl to block redemptions in an effort to manage liquidity.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran War: European Nations See Inevitable Hormuz Fees | Daybreak Europe 7/3/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：欧洲国家不可避免地要向霍尔木兹收费欧洲黎明 7/3/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, Global stocks and futures rebound following a two-day selloff led by tech. US markets are closed for the Independence Day holiday.

Weaker than expected jobs data out of the US has challenged expectations that the Fed will raise interest rates this year. Nonfarm payrolls rose 57 thousand last month, well below estimates. Unemployment fell to 4.2% as labor force participation plunged.
.
Today's guest: Marianne Zangerl, Aberdeen, Global Head of Multi-Asset & Alternative Investment Solutions (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NATO Allies Spar Over Pipelines, Ukraine Support in Summit Talks
title_cn: 北约盟国就管道问题发生争执，乌克兰在峰会会谈中表示支持
summary: NATO members are struggling to coalesce around a joint statement for their summit next week due to disagreements over projects to extend the alliance’s fuel pipelines to eastern Europe and the duration of financial support for Ukraine.

title: Burnham Risks Repeat of Starmer’s Mistake With Rushed Transition
title_cn: 伯纳姆可能会重蹈斯塔默的覆辙，仓促转型
summary: Failure to get sufficiently ready for government was fundamental to the downfall of Prime Minister Keir Starmer. Now, some in the Labour Party are worried Andy Burnham risks repeating that mistake as he delays key personnel decisions in his lightning-quick march on No. 10.

title: Historian Jill Lepore on the US at 250
title_cn: 历史学家吉尔·莱波雷 (Jill Lepore) 谈 250 岁的美国
summary: For America’s 250th anniversary, the Pulitzer Prize-winning historian Jill Lepore joins Mishal Husain to take her through her book on the US Constitution. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India, Japan Sign Over 100 Deals From Mushrooms to the Moon
title_cn: 印度与日本签署 100 多项从蘑菇到月球的协议
summary: Standing in front of fresh lilies and silver statues of peafowls, Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and his Japanese counterpart Sanae Takaichi shared the new dynamic they’ve settled on: “little sister” and “big brother.”
